title: Open the 'Addresses' screen
test_steps: Open the cryptocurrency wallet application. | Navigate to the 'Addresses' screen.
expected_result: The 'Addresses' screen is displayed. | The 'Wallets' and 'Imported Addresses' sections are visible.

title: Add a new wallet
test_steps: Open the 'Addresses' screen. | Click on the plus icon under the 'Wallets' section.
expected_result: A new wallet creation form is displayed.

title: Add a new imported address
test_steps: Open the 'Addresses' screen. | Click on the plus icon under the 'Imported Addresses' section.
expected_result: A new imported address creation form is displayed.

title: Verify the default wallet
test_steps: Open the 'Addresses' screen. | Verify that 'My Bitcoin Wallet' is marked as the default wallet.
expected_result: 'My Bitcoin Wallet' is marked as the default wallet.

title: Check wallet balance
test_steps: Open the 'Addresses' screen. | Verify the balance of 'My Bitcoin Wallet' is 0.0 BTC.
expected_result: The balance of 'My Bitcoin Wallet' is 0.0 BTC.

title: Navigate back to the previous screen
test_steps: Open the 'Addresses' screen. | Click on the back arrow in the header/app bar.
expected_result: The application navigates back to the previous screen.

title: Check accessibility/usability
test_steps: Open the 'Addresses' screen. | Perform a screen reader test to ensure all elements are accessible.
expected_result: All elements are accessible via screen reader.

title: Test data persistence
test_steps: Open the 'Addresses' screen. | Add a new wallet and imported address. | Navigate to the home screen and back to the 'Addresses' screen. | Verify the new wallet and imported address are still present.
expected_result: The new wallet and imported address are still present.
